blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,347 ft. Looking ahead, 47 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 16".
